---
name: Dataset / benchmark proposal
about: Propose a new dataset integration or benchmark
title: "[DATASET] "
labels: new dataset, help wanted
assignees: ''
---

**Dataset name**
What is the dataset called?

**Language(s)**
Which language(s) does it cover?

**Task**
- [ ] Machine translation
- [ ] ASR
- [ ] Summarisation
- [ ] Classification
- [ ] Code-switching
- [ ] Other: ___

**Source**
Where is the dataset hosted? (HuggingFace, GitHub, paper URL, etc.)

**License**
What license does it use? Is it suitable for open benchmarking?

**Why is this dataset valuable for NaijaEval?**
What gap does it fill?

**Are you willing to write the loader?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] Proposing only
